journey.name: 05-assets
journey.description: 资产管理：编辑/详情/隐藏-显示。隐藏操作在本 journey 内自恢复，避免污染后续。

actions.action: Open the navigation drawer and navigate to the assets (资产) management screen
Open "测试信用卡" to view its asset detail
Verify the asset detail screen renders the balance and record history without crashing
Navigate back to the assets list
Edit "测试信用卡": change its name to "测试信用卡改", then save
Verify the asset now shows "测试信用卡改"
Open the invisible/hidden assets screen and verify "测试现金" is listed there
Unhide "测试现金" so it returns to the visible assets list (restore state)
Verify "测试现金" is back in the visible assets list
